sentences.english: My room is small but very cozy.
I have a bed, a desk, and a bookshelf.
There are many photos on the wall from my trips.
sentences.korean: 벽에 여행에서 찍은 사진이 많이 있어요.

sentences.english: My desk is usually messy because I have too many books.
sentences.korean: 책이 너무 많아서 책상이 보통 지저분해요.

sentences.english: I like to open the window in the morning to get fresh air.
sentences.korean: 아침에 창문을 열어서 신선한 공기를 쐬는 걸 좋아해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
